description:
Parent epic: V3 E6: Credential brokering

Source task 3/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Ensure raw secrets never enter prompts, transcripts, traces, or tool args.

Epic closure criteria:
- credential brokering has either a working minimal implementation or a
  deliberately documented interface contract with follow-up issues
- the security invariant is tested: no raw credential values leak

comments.text: Added raw credential detection and rejection across public chat/session context and tool preflight, while redacting sensitive debug context previews.

title: E6: Ensure raw secrets never enter prompts, transcripts, traces, or tool args
